name: 货币与金融
subject: math
curriculum_points:
C2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct simple expressions, equations and formulas. e.g. write an expression for a number that is 2 more than n.
Includes constructing linear simultaneous equations.
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).
3 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two unknowns.

E2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct expressions, equations and formulas. e.g. write an expression for the product of two consecutive even numbers.
Includes constructing simultaneous equations.
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).
4 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two unknowns.
